sourceMovie.title: The Killer
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: The Killer (2023) stuck because it commits to its crime premise without apologizing—viewers remember set pieces and momentum as much as plot. David Fincher's control of tone keeps the ride coherent. The crime and thriller blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: American Psycho
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If The Killer clicked for you, American Psycho (2000) is a strong next stop: both trade in crime and thriller, with unease that lingers after the credits. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after The Killer?
faq.answer: Try American Psycho, Nightcrawler, The Transporter—each shares DNA with The Killer while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is The Killer?
faq.answer: The Killer (2023) is best described as Crime, Thriller. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is The Killer worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.6/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this crime lane.
